message:
chore(ftui-pty): bump to 0.2.2

Unreleased changes since 0.2.1:
- Buffer size limits for CSI/OSC parser to prevent memory exhaustion
- Saturating duration arithmetic for VM safety
- Bracketed paste delimiter injection safety with fallback to raw passthrough
- Test environment stability improvements

Closes #43

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,12 +2,14 @@
 name = "ftui-harness"
 version = "0.2.1"
 edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+license = "MIT"
 description = "Test harness and reference fixtures for FrankenTUI."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-harness"
 readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
+categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [features]
 default = []
@@ -30,7 +32,7 @@ tracing = "0.1.41"
 proptest = "1.7.0"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-ftui-pty = { path = "../ftui-pty", version = "0.2.1" }
+ftui-pty = { path = "../ftui-pty", version = "0.2.2" }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 ratatui = "0.30.0"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.20", features = ["registry"] }

@@ -1,13 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-pty"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.2.2"
 edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+license = "MIT"
 description = "PTY-backed test utilities for FrankenTUI."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-pty"
 readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
+categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
 frankenterm-core = { version = "0.2.0", features = ["ws-codec"] }
